thesis_short: Japanese-style retail + DPS grew 12x in 3 years + PEG 0.57 growth catalyst

thesis_short: Reserve for catching stocks when price drops >=20% from high AND thesis intact
strength_1: Available immediately - no opportunity cost lock-up
strength_2: Earmarked for portfolio stocks only (not new names) = focused deployment
strength_3: Sized small (5%) so it forces selectivity - only deployed on real conviction events
weakness_1: Idle cash = opportunity cost during normal markets
weakness_2: Discipline required - easy to deploy too early on minor dips
weakness_3: Only 5% means cannot rescue catastrophic drawdown - relies on stock selection
